name: CSS integration from multiple builders
description: When integrating CSS changes from multiple builders, prioritize CSS variable-based styles over hardcoded values. Builder-css-v3's text card button styles (using --bg-primary, --border-color) should override builder-cards-v3's rgba styles for consistency with theme variables. Always keep CSS variable definitions for maintainability.

name: Grid callback propagation for card actions
description: When card component API expands to include new callbacks (e.g., onEdit, onDelete), update Grid constructor to accept these callbacks and propagate them to createCard calls. Ensure both appendCards and updateCard methods pass all required callbacks to maintain consistency.
